ohtani.title: Vargas, Tawa lead the D-backs to a win over Dodgers
ohtani.blurb: Ildemaro Vargas hits a go-ahead RBI single and Tim Tawa homers, backing a good bullpen performance to lead the D-backs to a 5-3 win

imanaga.title: Greene, De La Cruz propel Reds to 4-0 victory
imanaga.blurb: A dozen strikeouts from Hunter Greene, and a two-hit day for Elly De La Cruz lead the Reds to a 4-0 shutout win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Alex Bregman drives in four in Cubs' win
suzuki.blurb: Alex Bregman hits a three-run homer as part of a four-RBI game in the Cubs' 8-4 win over the Reds

yoshida.title: Anthony Seigler, Jarren Duran lead Red Sox to 3-2 win
yoshida.blurb: Anthony Seigler hits a go-ahead sacrifice fly and Jarren Duran hits a game tying single to give the Red Sox a 3-2 win over the Mets

okamoto.title: 8th inning rally leads Padres to 5-4 victory
okamoto.blurb: Manny Machado hits a game-tying single and Ty France lifts a go-ahead sac fly in the 8th to lead the Padres to a 5-4 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Braden Montgomery's four RBIs lead White Sox to win
murakami.blurb: Thanks to home runs from Braden Montgomery and Sam Antonacci, the White Sox beat the A's 9-1 to complete the sweep

matsui.title: Ty France's home run propels Padres to one-run win
matsui.blurb: Ty France delivers a go-ahead home run to power the Padres to an 8-7 win over the Blue Jays
